title: Fake Google Reviews: How to Detect, Report, and Remove Them
titleZh: 假 Google 評論：如何偵測、檢舉和移除
targetQuery: fake google reviews, how to remove fake reviews, flag fake review google
metaDescription: Learn how to identify and remove fake Google reviews. This guide covers detection red flags, Google's official flagging process, legal options, and tools to protect your business reputation.
author: Sarah Kim
